description: CompositionCream printed kurta made of 100% cotton, sleeveless with raglan shoulder panels in blue and a blue back neckline, has a round neck on the front and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this cream kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this stylish raglan-styled sleeveless kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
